# AlphaLux Cleaning

> Premium residential and commercial cleaning services across New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. Contact: (631) 336-8565 | info@alphaluxcleaning.com | Hours: Mon–Sat 7AM–7PM | https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com

## Services

- [Standard Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/standard-cleaning) — Routine weekly/biweekly/monthly cleaning for residential homes.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/deep-cleaning) — Comprehensive top-to-bottom clean including behind appliances, grout, and cabinets.
- [Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/move-in-move-out-cleaning) — Full detail clean for homes during tenant or owner transitions.
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/recurring-cleaning) — Scheduled ongoing cleaning plans (weekly, biweekly, monthly).
- [Carpet & Upholstery Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/carpet-upholstery-cleaning) — Hot water extraction cleaning for carpets, rugs, and furniture.
- [Airbnb Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/airbnb-cleaning) — Fast turnover cleaning for short-term rental properties.
- [Vacation Rental Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/vacation-rental-cleaning) — Guest-ready cleaning for vacation properties across NY, NJ, CT.
- [Post Construction Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/post-construction-cleaning) — Dust, debris, and detail cleaning after renovations or new construction.
- [Commercial Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/commercial-cleaning) — Professional cleaning for offices, retail, and commercial properties.
- [Janitorial Cleaning](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/services/janitorial-cleaning) — Ongoing daily/weekly facility maintenance for businesses.

## Service Areas

- [New York City](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/new-york-city) — All five boroughs, NYC apartments, condos, and offices.
- [Long Island](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/long-island) — Nassau, Suffolk, Hamptons, and North Shore homes.
- [Syracuse, NY](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/syracuse) — Central New York residential and commercial cleaning.
- [Rochester, NY](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/rochester) — Rochester and Monroe County cleaning services.
- [Buffalo, NY](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/buffalo) — Western New York homes and businesses.
- [Newark, NJ](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/newark-nj) — Newark and surrounding Essex County, New Jersey.
- [Trenton, NJ](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/trenton-nj) — Trenton and central New Jersey cleaning services.
- [New Haven, CT](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/new-haven-ct) — New Haven and surrounding Connecticut communities.
- [Hartford, CT](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/hartford-ct) — Hartford and greater Connecticut Capital region.
- [Danbury, CT](https://www.alphaluxcleaning.com/service-areas/danbury-ct) — Danbury and Fairfield County, Connecticut.
